telegramAccountId.description: Telegram account ID from OpenClaw config (defaults to 'default')

ownerAllowFrom.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to use admin tools

silent.description: Send posts silently (no notification) by default

notifyChatId.description: Chat ID to send notifications to

channel.chatId.label: Channel ID
channel.chatId.help: Telegram channel username (@channel) or numeric ID (-100...)

discussion.chatId.label: Discussion Group ID
discussion.chatId.help: Supergroup ID linked to the channel for comments

ownerAllowFrom.label: Allowed Owner IDs
ownerAllowFrom.help: Telegram user IDs that can use admin actions

defaults.silent.label: Silent by default
defaults.silent.help: Posts will be sent without notification if enabled

mtproto.enabled.label: Enable MTProto Stats
mtproto.enabled.help: Enable MTProto-based channel statistics (requires user account session)

mtproto.apiId.label: API ID
mtproto.apiId.help: Telegram API ID (or set TELEGRAM_API_ID env var)

mtproto.apiHash.label: API Hash
mtproto.apiHash.help: Telegram API Hash (or set TELEGRAM_API_HASH env var)

notifications.onComment.enabled.label: Comment Notifications
notifications.onComment.enabled.help: Send a notification when a new comment is posted

notifications.onComment.notifyChatId.label: Notify Chat ID
notifications.onComment.notifyChatId.help: Chat ID to send comment notifications to (e.g. your personal chat with the bot)

notifications.onComment.minInterval.label: Min Notification Interval (seconds)
notifications.onComment.minInterval.help: Throttle notifications to avoid spam (default: 60 seconds)
